output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?ship ?originalName WHERE {
  ?convoy wdt:P221 'SC' ; wdt:P392 '94' .
  ?ship wdt:P327 ?convoy .
  ?ship wdt:P202 wd:Q109401 .
  ?ship wdt:P570 ?originalName .
}
output.answer: The original name of the ship in Convoy SC 94 belonging to the Royal Navy (dating back to the early 16th century) was HMS *Euryalus*. This ship was later renamed to *HMS Euryalus* from its original name upon commissioning into the Royal Navy.
output.formatted:
The original name of the ship in Convoy SC 94 belonging to the Royal Navy (dating back to the early 16th century) was HMS *Euryalus*. This ship was later renamed to *HMS Euryalus* from its original name upon commissioning into the Royal Navy.

```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?ship ?originalName WHERE {
  ?convoy wdt:P221 'SC' ; wdt:P392 '94' .
  ?ship wdt:P327 ?convoy .
  ?ship wdt:P202 wd:Q109401 .
  ?ship wdt:P570 ?originalName .
}
```

args.answer: The original name of the ship in Convoy SC 94 belonging to the Royal Navy (dating back to the early 16th century) was HMS *Euryalus*. This ship was later renamed to *HMS Euryalus* from its original name upon commissioning into the Royal Navy.
